context: Tests whether the agent generates correct schema.org JSON-LD structured data for a buying-guide article that features shoppable products. Evaluates use of the @graph pattern, correct Article and ItemList types, and correct field values including numeric prices and schema.org availability URIs.

checklist.name: @context value
checklist.description: The output JSON-LD includes '@context': 'https://schema.org' at the top level

checklist.name: @graph structure
checklist.description: The top-level object uses a '@graph' array rather than a single '@type' at the root

checklist.name: Article type present
checklist.description: The @graph array contains an entry with '@type': 'Article'

checklist.name: Article required fields
checklist.description: The Article entry includes 'headline', 'datePublished', and 'dateModified' fields

checklist.name: Article author as Organization
checklist.description: The Article's 'author' field is an object with '@type': 'Organization' (not 'Person')

checklist.name: ItemList type present
checklist.description: The @graph array contains an entry with '@type': 'ItemList'

checklist.name: ListItem entries with position
checklist.description: The ItemList's 'itemListElement' contains entries with '@type': 'ListItem' and a 'position' field that is 1-indexed (starts at 1)

checklist.name: Product type in ListItem
checklist.description: Each ListItem's 'item' field has '@type': 'Product' with 'name', 'image', and 'url' fields

checklist.name: Price is numeric string (not currency-formatted)
checklist.description: The offers 'price' value is a plain numeric string like '249.99' — it does NOT contain a '$', '£', currency code, or other currency symbol

checklist.name: Availability uses schema.org URI
checklist.description: The 'availability' field uses 'https://schema.org/InStock' or 'https://schema.org/OutOfStock' (the full URI, not a short form like 'InStock' alone)

checklist.name: Output file produced
checklist.description: A schema_output.json file exists and contains valid JSON with a '@graph' array
